relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file documents customer complaints and escalations for compliance review, while the outbound file reports sanctions list screening matches. Although both involve compliance and risk assessment, they address fundamentally different use cases: complaint handling vs. sanctions screening. The inbound data contains complaint details (unauthorized transactions, customer grievances) with no customer identity verification or sanctions screening information. The outbound file requires detailed entity identification (passport, nationality, DOB) and sanctions list matching data that are not present or derivable from the inbound complaint escalation schema. The data domains are distinct and the outbound sanctions hit message cannot plausibly be constructed from complaint escalation data.
